jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 1.5.1 to 2.7.18 to align with Java 21 compatibility requirements.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5.x does not support Java 21; the application will fail to compile or run due to unsupported bytecode version and removed APIs.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-compiler-plugin uses this property; leaving it at 1.8 would cause compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities on JDK 21.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the removed spring-boot-starter-data-rest dependency with spring-boot-properties-migrator to assist in configuration migration.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: spring-boot-starter-data-rest was removed in Spring Boot 2.7; keeping it causes a dependency resolution failure.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-security dependency required for the application's security configuration.
Add spring-boot-devtools dependency for development-time features.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator dependency for monitoring and management endpoints.
Add jgravatar dependency for Gravatar image retrieval.
Add expiringmap dependency for caching functionality.
Add postgresql driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add guava dependency for utility classes.
Add h2 database dependency for in-memory testing or development.
Add opencsv dependency for CSV processing.
Add lutung dependency for Mandrill email integration.
Add javase (QRGen) dependency for QR code generation.
Add querydsl-apt dependency for QueryDSL annotation processing.
Add querydsl-jpa dependency for QueryDSL JPA integration.
Add jakarta.validation-api dependency to replace javax.validation in newer Spring Boot versions.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.7+ uses Jakarta EE namespaces; javax.validation is no longer provided by default, causing compile errors if used.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotations removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation classes are no longer part of the JDK in Java 11+, causing NoClassDefFoundError at runtime if not explicitly added.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-configuration-processor dependency for metadata generation.
Add twitter4j-core dependency for Twitter API integration.
Add spring-security-test dependency for security testing support.
Add junit-jupiter-api dependency for JUnit 5 testing.
Add junit (vintage) dependency to support legacy JUnit 4 tests.
Add junit-jupiter-engine dependency for JUnit 5 test execution.
Add junit-vintage-engine dependency to run JUnit 4 tests on the JUnit Platform.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the java.version property for source and target levels.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler might default to an older Java version, causing compatibility issues with Java 21 features or libraries.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-surefire-plugin to use the JUnit Platform provider for test execution.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.7+ uses JUnit 5; without the platform provider, tests may not be discovered or executed correctly.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add apt-maven-plugin configuration for QueryDSL annotation processing.
Add jitpack.io repository to resolve dependencies hosted on JitPack.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new project name 'jelatyna'.
Update project name and description to reflect the new project identity.
Externalize dependency versions into properties for better maintainability.
Remove jackson-datatype-jsr310 dependency as it is included by default in Spring Boot 2.7+.
Exclude junit 4 from spring-boot-starter-test to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.7+ uses JUnit 5; including JUnit 4 can cause test execution conflicts or failures.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to include specific profiles and build info.

jelatyna-backend/src/main/resources/appl.general_idea: Update server port from 9090 to 3000 to align with new deployment or frontend proxy configuration.
Add explicit empty context-path configuration under server.servlet.
Replace hardcoded Twitter API credentials with placeholder values for security.
Update Twitter callback URL to include login path.
Add new Twitter access token configuration properties.
Update database URL to remove year suffix and add Unicode/encoding parameters.
Change Hibernate DDL auto mode from none to update to allow schema evolution.
Remove explicit Hibernate SQL logging configuration properties.
jelatyna-backend/src/main/resources/appl.before:
properties:
      hibernate:
        show_sql: true
        format_sql: true

jelatyna-backend/src/main/resources/appl.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator management endpoint configuration.
Add custom conference date range configuration properties.
Add UI origin configuration property for CORS or frontend integration.
